parameters.jsCode:
// ============================================================
// SAVE TO POSTGRESQL
// Saves the fully enriched + correlated CVE
// NOTE: Configure your Postgres credentials in n8n credentials
// ============================================================
const cve = $input.item.json;

// Prepare the data for storage
// We'll use the Execute Query node after this to actually save
const insertData = {
  cve_id: cve.cve_id,
  source: cve.source || 'UNKNOWN',
  title: cve.title || cve.cve_id,
  description: (cve.description || '').substring(0, 5000),
  plain_english_summary: cve.plain_english_summary || '',
  cvss_score: cve.cvss_score || 0,
  cvss_vector: cve.cvss_vector || '',
  severity: cve.severity || 'UNKNOWN',
  urgency: cve.urgency || 'MEDIUM',
  category: cve.category || 'UNCATEGORIZED',
  attack_type: cve.attack_type || 'Unknown',
  epss_score: cve.epss_score || 0,
  epss_percentile: cve.epss_percentile || 0,
  priority_score: cve.priority_score || 0,
  is_cisa_kev: cve.is_cisa_kev || false,
  has_exploit: cve.has_exploit || false,
  affected_products: JSON.stringify(cve.affected_products || []),
  references: JSON.stringify(cve.references || []),
  threat_actors: JSON.stringify(cve.threat_actors || []),
  mitre_techniques: JSON.stringify(cve.mitre_techniques || []),
  attack_chain: JSON.stringify(cve.attack_chain || {}),
  exploitation_timeline: cve.exploitation_timeline || 'unknown',
  recommended_action: cve.recommended_action || '',
  technical_impact: cve.technical_impact || '',
  correlation_confidence: cve.correlation_data?.correlation_confidence || 0,
  analyst_notes: cve.correlation_data?.analyst_notes || '',
  published_at: cve.published_at || new Date().toISOString(),
  enriched_at: cve.enriched_at || new Date().toISOString(),
  correlated_at: cve.correlated_at || new Date().toISOString(),
  created_at: new Date().toISOString()
};

return [{ json: insertData }];

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO cve_intelligence (
  cve_id, source, title, description, plain_english_summary,
  cvss_score, cvss_vector, severity, urgency, category, attack_type,
  epss_score, epss_percentile, priority_score, is_cisa_kev, has_exploit,
  affected_products, "references", threat_actors, mitre_techniques,
  attack_chain, exploitation_timeline, recommended_action, technical_impact,
  correlation_confidence, analyst_notes, published_at, enriched_at,
  correlated_at, created_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.cve_id }}', '{{ $json.source }}', '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.description.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.plain_english_summary.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.cvss_score }}, '{{ $json.cvss_vector }}',
  '{{ $json.severity }}', '{{ $json.urgency }}',
  '{{ $json.category }}', '{{ $json.attack_type }}',
  {{ $json.epss_score }}, {{ $json.epss_percentile }},
  {{ $json.priority_score }}, {{ $json.is_cisa_kev }}, {{ $json.has_exploit }},
  '{{ $json.affected_products }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.references }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.threat_actors }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.mitre_techniques }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.attack_chain }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.exploitation_timeline }}',
  '{{ $json.recommended_action.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.technical_impact.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.correlation_confidence }},
  '{{ $json.analyst_notes.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.published_at }}', '{{ $json.enriched_at }}',
  '{{ $json.correlated_at }}', '{{ $json.created_at }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (cve_id) DO UPDATE SET
  priority_score = EXCLUDED.priority_score,
  urgency = EXCLUDED.urgency,
  threat_actors = EXCLUDED.threat_actors,
  correlated_at = EXCLUDED.correlated_at,
  analyst_notes = EXCLUDED.analyst_notes;

SELECT * FROM cve_intelligence
WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
ORDER BY priority_score DESC
LIMIT 50;
